vBRIEFInfo.description: Scope vBRIEF for #724: Close the ~90s public-exposure window observed during v0.21.0 cut by adding a post-create verify-isDraft gate to scripts/release.py.

narratives.Overview: scripts/release.py Step 10 currently exits on a successful gh release create exit code without verifying that the release actually landed in draft state. During the v0.21.0 cut the manual recovery created a public release for ~90s before being flipped. This vBRIEF adds a polling verify gate (up to 5 attempts at 1s intervals) immediately after the create step that auto-flips a public-by-mistake release to draft via gh release edit --draft=true. Reuses the _resolve_gh() helper from #722.

items.title: Add verify_release_draft() helper + Step 11 to scripts/release.py

narrative.Action: Implement verify_release_draft(project_root, version, repo, *, max_attempts=5, interval=1.0) using _resolve_gh; poll `gh release view v<ver> --json isDraft`; flip via `gh release edit v<ver> --draft=true` when isDraft is false; warn-only when release not found within budget.
narrative.Acceptance: Function is invoked after a successful create_github_release call when config.draft is True; auto-flip emits a WARNING line citing #724; not-found within budget emits a WARNING line and does not fail the pipeline.

items.title: Document the 5s verify gate in skills/deft-directive-release/SKILL.md Phase 4

narrative.Action: Add a `!` MUST rule to Phase 4 stating the pipeline MUST verify isDraft within 5 seconds and flip immediately if not, plus a `⊗` anti-pattern against skipping the verify gate.
narrative.Acceptance: Phase 4 prose explicitly references the 5s verify-isDraft gate and the auto-flip behaviour.

items.title: Cover the three verify-gate paths in tests/cli/test_release.py

narrative.Action: Monkeypatch subprocess.run to simulate (a) happy path: isDraft=true on first poll → no flip; (b) defense path: isDraft=false → auto-flip is invoked; (c) timeout path: release-not-found across all attempts → WARNING emitted, exit 0.
narrative.Acceptance: All three tests assert the correct argv shape (gh release view ...; gh release edit --draft=true) and the pipeline returns EXIT_OK.

references.title: Issue #724: release: ~90s public-exposure window when gh release create errors mid-pipeline
Issue #721: canonical recovery anchor for the v0.21.0 cut session
